moves.name: Crack the Spine
moves.description: She twists her torso backward while in mid-air, swinging both arms in an overhead scissoring motion to strike with the heels of both hands at the target's spine.
moves.image_snapshot: Supine mid-air, arms above head in V shape, legs dangling straight down, torso twisted 180 degrees backward, head hanging inverted. Motion blur on both hands.

moves.name: Twirl and Bite
moves.description: She leaps forward while spinning her body horizontally, extending one leg to sweep at head height while her stiletto nails rake backward.
moves.image_snapshot: Mid-air spin, body perpendicular to ground, right leg extended horizontally past torso, both arms trailing behind, twin pigtails whipped outward. Speed lines on spinning body.

moves.name: Doll's Split
moves.description: She drops into a near splits position while leaning far back, dragging her stiletto nails along the ground as she slides forward to rake the target's shins.
moves.image_snapshot: Wide straddle split, palms on ground between legs, torso tilted backward 60 degrees, head hanging, legs spread full. Motion blur on sliding hands.
